gist.headline: Fresh canvas: PollGen
gist.blurb: A new minimal way to paint with pixels. PollGen joins the creative showcase.
gist.summary: Added PollGen, a lightweight web interface for image generation, to the community apps collection.
gist.impact: Users have a new, streamlined tool for crafting prompts and generating images with the API.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee in a cozy pixel art studio, unveiling a new easel labeled 'PollGen'. The focus is on creativity and new tools.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot in a sunlit art studio, presenting a new easel with a glowing canvas. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Pixel text on easel: 'POLLGEN'. Nostalgic and creative atmosphere.
